entries.description:
A profile that summarizes whether the current process is running on an
AI coding agent.

The shape is intentionally minimal so that callers can use it as a UX hint
(for example, to switch output format) without coupling to specific agent
names. To get the type, use `ReturnType<typeof getAgentProfile>`.
entries.name: AgentProfile
entries.signature: interface AgentProfile

entries.description:
Get the AI coding agent profile of the current process.

The detection itself is delegated to `std-env`. This function only converts
the upstream `agentInfo` into Gunshi's minimal {@link AgentProfile} shape.
entries.name: getAgentProfile

returns.description:
An {@link AgentProfile} describing whether the process is running
  on an AI coding agent and, if so, which agent was detected.

entries.signature: export function getAgentProfile(): AgentProfile

entries.description:
Run the command.

This overload accepts any command-like object using a loose structural type.
It bypasses TypeScript contravariance issues with callback properties.

Note: This overload MUST be last in the overload list. TypeScript checks overloads
in declaration order and selects the first matching one. The SubCommandable type
is intentionally loose and would match any command, so placing it first would
prevent proper type inference for more specific command types.
entries.name: cli

params.description: A command-like object (command, command runner, or lazy command)
params.name: entry

returns.description: A rendered usage or undefined. if you will use {@linkcode CliOptions.usageSilent} option, it will return rendered usage string.

entries.signature: export async function cli(args: string[], entry: SubCommandable, options?: CliOptions): Promise<string | undefined>

type CommandContextResult<
  G extends GunshiParamsConstraint,
  E extends Record<string, CommandContextExtension>
> = {} extends ExtractExtensionValues<E>
    ? Readonly<CommandContext<G>>
    : Readonly<
        CommandContext<
          GunshiParams<{ args: ExtractArgs<G>; extensions: ExtractExtensionValues<E> }>
        >
      >

entries.description: Parameters of {@link createCommandContext}
entries.name: CommandContextParams
entries.signature:
export interface CommandContextParams<
  G extends GunshiParams | { args: Args } | { extensions: ExtendContext },
  V extends ArgValues<ExtractArgs<G>>,
  C extends Command<G> | LazyCommand<G> = Command<G>,
  E extends Record<string, CommandContextExtension> = Record<string, CommandContextExtension>
>

entries.description: Create a command context.
entries.name: createCommandContext

params.description: A {@link CommandContextParams | parameters} to create a command context.
params.name: param

returns.description: A {@link CommandContext | command context}, which is readonly.

entries.signature:
export async function createCommandContext<
  G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams,
  V extends ArgValues<ExtractArgs<G>> = ArgValues<ExtractArgs<G>>,
  C extends Command<G> | LazyCommand<G> = Command<G>,
  E extends Record<string, CommandContextExtension> = {}
>({
  args = {} as ExtractArgs<G>,
  explicit = {} as ExtractArgExplicitlyProvided<G>,
  values = {} as V,
  positionals = [],
  rest = [],
  argv = [],
  tokens = [],
  command = {} as C,
  extensions = {} as E,
  cliOptions = {} as CliOptions<G>,
  callMode = 'entry',
  commandPath = [],
  omitted = false,
  validationError
}: CommandContextParams<G, V, C, E>): Promise<CommandContextResult<G, E>>

entries.description: Helper type to extract plugin ID from dependency
entries.name: ExtractDependencyId
entries.signature:
export type ExtractDependencyId<D> = D extends PluginDependency
  ? D['id']
  : D extends string
    ? D
    : never

entries.description: Helper type to check if dependency is optional
entries.name: IsOptionalDependency
entries.signature:
export type IsOptionalDependency<D> = D extends PluginDependency
  ? D['optional'] extends true
    ? true
    : false
  : false

entries.description: Helper type to infer dependency extensions with optional support
entries.name: InferDependencyExtensions
entries.signature:
export type InferDependencyExtensions<
  D extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>,
  A extends ExtendContext
> = D extends readonly []
  ? {}
  : D extends readonly [infer First, ...infer Rest]
    ? ProcessDependency<First, A> &
        (Rest extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>
          ? InferDependencyExtensions<Rest, A>
          : {})
    : {}

export type PluginExtension<

> = (ctx: CommandContextCore<G>, cmd: Command<G>) => Awaitable<T>

entries.description: Extensions resolved from the declared plugin dependencies.

entries.signature:
type DependencyExtensions<
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>,
  Context extends ExtendContext
> = InferDependencyExtensions<Deps, Context>

entries.description: Gunshi params available while a plugin extension resolves its dependencies.
entries.name: DependencyParams
entries.signature:
type DependencyParams<
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>,
  Context extends ExtendContext
> = GunshiParams<{
  args: Args
  extensions: DependencyExtensions<Deps, Context>
}>

entries.description: Extensions available after applying the current plugin extension.
entries.name: MergedPluginExtensions
entries.signature:
type MergedPluginExtensions<
  Id extends string,
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>,
  Context extends ExtendContext,
  Ext extends ExtendContext
> = MergeExtension<Id, DependencyExtensions<Deps, Context>, Ext>

entries.description: Gunshi params available after applying the current plugin extension.
entries.name: MergedPluginParams
entries.signature:
type MergedPluginParams<
  Id extends string,
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string>,
  Context extends ExtendContext,
  Ext extends ExtendContext
> = GunshiParams<{
  args: Args
  extensions: MergedPluginExtensions<Id, Deps, Context, Ext>
}>

entries.description: Plugin definition options

entries.signature:
export interface PluginOptions<
  DepExt extends ExtendContext = DefaultGunshiParams['extensions'], // for plugin dependency extensions
  Id extends string = string, // for plugin id
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string> = (PluginDependency | string)[], // for plugin dependencies
  Ext extends Record<string, unknown> = {}, // for plugin extension type
  ResolvedDepExt extends GunshiParams = DependencyParams<Deps, DepExt>,
  PluginExt extends PluginExtension<Ext, ResolvedDepExt> = PluginExtension<Ext, ResolvedDepExt>,
  MergedExt extends GunshiParams = MergedPluginParams<
    Id,
    Deps,
    DepExt,
    Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>
  >
>

  E extends GunshiParams['extensions'] = DefaultGunshiParams['extensions']
> extends Plugin<E>

entries.description: Define a plugin with extension compatibility and typed dependency extensions
entries.name: plugin

returns.description: A defined plugin with extension

entries.signature:
export function plugin<
  Context extends ExtendContext = DefaultGunshiParams['extensions'], // for plugin dependency extensions
  Id extends string = string, // for plugin id
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string> = [], // for plugin dependencies
  Extension extends {} = {}, // for plugin extension type
  ResolvedDepExtensions extends GunshiParams = DependencyParams<Deps, Context>,
  PluginExt extends PluginExtension<Extension, DefaultGunshiParams> = PluginExtension<
    Extension,
    ResolvedDepExtensions
  >,
  MergedExtensions extends GunshiParams = MergedPluginParams<
    Id,
    Deps,
    Context,
    Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>
  >
>(options: {
  id: Id
  name?: string
  dependencies?: Deps
  setup?: (
    ctx: Readonly<
      PluginContext<MergedPluginParams<Id, Deps, Context, Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>>>
    >
  ) => Awaitable<void>
  extension: PluginExt
  onExtension?: OnPluginExtension<MergedExtensions>
}): PluginWithExtension<Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>>

tags.typeParam: Context - A type extending {@linkcode ExtendContext} to specify the shape of plugin dependency extensions.

entries.description: Define a plugin without extension and typed dependency extensions
entries.name: plugin

returns.description: A defined plugin without extension

entries.signature:
export function plugin<
  Context extends ExtendContext = DefaultGunshiParams['extensions'], // for plugin dependency extensions
  Id extends string = string, // for plugin id
  Deps extends ReadonlyArray<PluginDependency | string> = [], // for plugin dependencies
  Extension extends Record<string, unknown> = {}, // for plugin extension type
  ResolvedDepExtensions extends GunshiParams = DependencyParams<Deps, Context>,
  PluginExt extends PluginExtension<Extension, DefaultGunshiParams> = PluginExtension<
    Extension,
    ResolvedDepExtensions
  >,
  MergedExtensions extends GunshiParams = MergedPluginParams<
    Id,
    Deps,
    Context,
    Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>
  >
>(options: {
  id: Id
  name?: string
  dependencies?: Deps
  setup?: (
    ctx: Readonly<
      PluginContext<MergedPluginParams<Id, Deps, Context, Awaited<ReturnType<PluginExt>>>>
    >
  ) => Awaitable<void>
  onExtension?: OnPluginExtension<MergedExtensions>
}): PluginWithoutExtension<DefaultGunshiParams['extensions']>

tags.typeParam: Context - A type extending {@linkcode ExtendContext} to specify the shape of plugin dependency extensions.

Gunshi unified parameter type.

Generic constraint for command-related types.

This type constraint allows both {@linkcode GunshiParams} and objects with extensions.

entries.description: Type helper to extract args

entries.signature:
export type ExtractArgs<G> = G extends GunshiParams<any>
    ? G['args']
    : G extends {
          args: infer A extends Args
        }
      ? A
      : Args

entries.description: Command context extension
entries.name: CommandContextExtension
entries.signature:
export interface CommandContextExtension<
  E extends GunshiParams['extensions'] = DefaultGunshiParams['extensions']
>

tags.typeParam: E - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams.extensions} to specify the shape of the extension.

entries.description: Rendering control options
entries.name: RenderingOptions
entries.signature: export interface RenderingOptions<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams>

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of render options.

entries.description: Command interface.
entries.name: Command
entries.signature: export interface Command<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams>

tags.typeParam: G - The Gunshi parameters constraint

entries.description:
Lazy command interface.

Lazy command that's not loaded until it is executed.
entries.name: LazyCommand

tags.typeParam: G - The Gunshi parameters constraint

entries.description: Define a command type.
entries.name: Commandable
entries.signature:
export type Commandable<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams> = | Command<G>
  | LazyCommand<G, {}>

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command.

entries.description:
Sub-command entry type for use in subCommands.

This type uses a loose structural match to bypass TypeScript's contravariance issues
with function parameters, allowing any Command or LazyCommand to be used as a sub-command.
entries.name: SubCommandable
entries.signature: export interface SubCommandable

entries.description: Command examples fetcher.
entries.name: CommandExamplesFetcher

returns.description: A fetched command examples.

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command context.

entries.description: Command runner.
entries.name: CommandRunner

returns.description: void or string (for CLI output)

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command context.

entries.description:
Command loader.

A function that returns a command or command runner.
This is used to lazily load commands.
entries.name: CommandLoader

returns.description: A command or command runner

entries.signature:
export type CommandLoader<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams> = () => Awaitable<
  Command<G> | CommandRunner<G>
>

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command context and command runner.

entries.description:
Command decorator.

A function that wraps a command runner to add or modify its behavior.
entries.name: CommandDecorator

params.description: The base command runner to decorate
params.name: baseRunner

returns.description: The decorated command runner

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command context.

entries.description:
Renderer decorator type.

A function that wraps a base renderer to add or modify its behavior.
entries.name: RendererDecorator

params.description: The base renderer function to decorate
params.name: baseRenderer

returns.description: The decorated result

tags.typeParam: T - The type of the rendered result.

entries.description:
Validation errors renderer decorator type.
A function that wraps a validation errors renderer to add or modify its behavior.
entries.name: ValidationErrorsDecorator

params.description: The base validation errors renderer function to decorate
params.name: baseRenderer

params.description: The aggregate error containing validation errors
params.name: error

returns.description: The decorated result

tags.typeParam: G - A type extending {@linkcode GunshiParams} to specify the shape of command context.

entries.description: Check if the given command is a {@link LazyCommand}.
entries.name: isLazyCommand

returns.description: `true` if the command is a {@link LazyCommand}, otherwise `false

entries.signature: export function isLazyCommand<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams>(cmd: unknown): cmd is LazyCommand<G>

entries.description: Resolve a lazy command to a {@link Command}.
entries.name: resolveLazyCommand

params.description: A {@link Commandable} or {@link LazyCommand} to resolve
params.name: cmd

params.description: Optional name of the command, if not provided, it will use the name from the command itself.
params.name: name

params.description: Whether to run the resolving function of the lazy command.
params.name: needRunResolving

returns.description: A resolved {@link Command}

entries.signature: export async function resolveLazyCommand<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams>(cmd: Commandable<G>, name?: string, needRunResolving: boolean = false): Promise<Command<G>>

entries.description: Create an object with the specified prototype. A shorthand for `Object.create`.
entries.name: create

params.description: An object to use as the prototype for the new object. If `null`, it will create an object with no prototype.
params.name: obj

returns.description: A new object with the specified prototype

entries.signature: export function create<T>(obj: object | null = null): T

entries.description: Log a message to the console.
entries.name: log
entries.signature: export function log(...args: unknown[]): void

entries.description: Get the sub-commands of a command as a normalized Map.
entries.name: getCommandSubCommands

returns.description: A Map of sub-commands, or undefined if the command has no sub-commands.

entries.signature: export function getCommandSubCommands<G extends GunshiParamsConstraint = DefaultGunshiParams>(cmd: Commandable<G> | Command<G> | LazyCommand<G>): Map<string, Command<G> | LazyCommand<G>> | undefined

entries.description: Deep freeze an object, making it immutable.
entries.name: deepFreeze

returns.description: A frozen object

entries.signature: export function deepFreeze<T extends Record<string, any>>(obj: T, ignores: string[] = []): Readonly<T>
